existing_features.title: Update all instances of the team/brand name text labels across the frontend so they are displayed as three separate styled elements: 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' — each word on its own line or as a distinct styled segment, consistent with the esports visual theme.

Center the three styled brand name elements ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') displayed in the hero section (the h1 elements at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/h1[1], h1[2], and h1[3]) so they are horizontally centered on the page instead of left-aligned.

In the left side top area of the hero section, remove the duplicate 'Legend X Arena' text labels (the second occurrence of the brand name) and replace them with the original logo image asset (the same logo used in the Navbar).
In the 'Meet the Team' (Roster) section, change the section heading text to 'Meet With LEGEND'.

In the News section, change the call-to-action button or label text to read 'Join Now' on the first line and 'For Tournament' on the second line (or as two distinct styled lines). This targets the two anchor/button elements at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/a[1] and /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/a[2].

Remove the gun/shooting canvas animation from the hero section. The canvas element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/canvas[1] renders a shooting animation (drawn arm, gun, bullets, shell casings, muzzle flash, recoil effects) — remove this entire animation and its associated canvas element, animation logic, and related code from HeroSection.tsx.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fully revert the entire frontend to its Version 44 state — restore all component styles, animations, CSS custom properties, Tailwind configuration, and layout settings exactly as they were in Version 44, undoing any changes introduced in Version 45 or Version 46.
Update text labels to display as: 'Legend', 'X', 'Arena' (styled/written in a specific way as requested by the user).
Center the 'Legend X Arena' text/elements on the page.
Remove the duplicate 'Legend X Arena' text shown on the left side (top area) and replace it with the original logo instead.
In the 'Meet the Team' section, change the heading/label text to 'Meet With LEGEND'.
In the News section, add/change the text to 'Join Now For Tournament'.
Remove the gun-related animation that appears after the above text changes.
